name: simplify
description: Run a cleanup review over changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency.

interface.shortDescription: Run a final cleanup review over changed code
interface.longDescription: Use Simplify to run a focused cleanup pass over current code changes, checking reuse opportunities, structural quality, and efficiency before considering the work finished.
defaultPrompt: Run simplify on the current diff
Review my recent code changes for cleanup opportunities
Check this implementation for reuse, quality, and efficiency issues
